task_completion.description: Verify the Voicemail ID and Name are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Voicemail ID' containing '8500' and 'Voicemail Name' containing 'WestCoast_Support' in the Vicidial Admin panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the Voicemail Password is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Password' or 'Pass' containing '4321'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Voicemail Email is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form field labeled 'Email' containing 'tickets@westcoast-support.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Voicemail Active status is set to Y.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or radio button labeled 'Active' set to 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Delete Voicemail After Email setting is set to Y.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or radio button labeled 'Delete Voicemail After Email' set to 'Y'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Voicemail Timezone is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown labeled 'Voicemail Timezone' set to 'America/Los_Angeles'. A final submission or save action should ideally be visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web GUI to configure the voicemail box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Vicidial Admin panel, not terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the information into the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be inside the Vicidial web interface form fields, not typed into a text editor, notes app, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page should look like a standard Vicidial Admin interface without signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the DOM to fake a success screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure a new voicemail box in Vicidial with the following exact parameters: Voicemail ID: '8500', Voicemail Name: 'WestCoast_Support', Password: '4321', Email: 'tickets@westcoast-support.com', Active: 'Y', Delete Voicemail After Email: 'Y', and Voicemail Timezone: 'America/Los_Angeles'.
